top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1990'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1990'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1990'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
HAVING COUNT(l.milliseconds) > 0
ORDER BY fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;
